# SDFrame API

- OpenAPI: https://sdframe.caldis.me/openapi.json
- Base URL: https://sdframe.caldis.me
- Auth: none
- Method: GET only
- Compact index: https://sdframe.caldis.me/api/frameworks.index.json
- Full dataset: https://sdframe.caldis.me/api/frameworks.json
- One framework: https://sdframe.caldis.me/api/frameworks/{slug}.json
- Categories: https://sdframe.caldis.me/api/categories.json
